title: buddleja albiflora var. hemsleyana
intro: Buddleja albiflora var. hemsleyana, also known as the White Butterfly Bush, is a flowering plant native to China, known for its long, conical panicles of small, white flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive problems, and acting as an antiviral agent. In herbal preparations, Buddleja albiflora var. hemsleyana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
